2606.24932.title: Recursive QLSTM with Dynamic Variational Quantum Circuit Adaptation
2606.24932.paper_summary: Recent advances in quantum computing and machine learning have motivated the development of quantum models for sequential data processing. In this paper, we propose a Recursive Quantum Long Short-Term Memory model, or Recursive QLSTM, which extends QLSTM through metacore-based recursive constructions. We numerically test the model under different input sequence lengths, metacore designs, and recursive rules, and identify the best-performing architecture among these variants. For this selected model, we further provide theoretical arguments explaining why its recursive structure improves temporal information propagation and enhances learning performance. Our results suggest that Recursive QLSTM offers a flexible and effective framework for quantum recurrent learning over input time series of various lengths.
2606.24932.paper_summary_zh: 最近在量子計算和機器學習方面的進展促進了量子模型在序列數據處理中的發展。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一種遞歸量子長短期記憶模型，或稱為遞歸 QLSTM，通過基於元核心的遞歸構造擴展了 QLSTM。<lb/>我們在不同的輸入序列長度、元核心設計和遞歸規則下對模型進行了數值測試，並確定了這些變體中表現最佳的架構。<lb/>對於這個選定的模型，我們進一步提供了理論論證，解釋為什麼其遞歸結構能改善時間信息的傳播並增強學習性能。<lb/>我們的結果表明，遞歸 QLSTM 為各種長度的輸入時間序列提供了一個靈活且有效的量子遞歸學習框架。
2606.24932.author: Samuel Yen-Chi Chen et.al.
2606.24932.authors: Samuel Yen-Chi Chen, Yifeng Peng, Jiun-Cheng Jiang, Chun-Hua Lin, Kuo-Chung Peng, Junghoon Justin Park, Huan-Hsin Tseng, Hsin-Yi Lin, Kuan-Cheng Chen, Chen-Yu Liu, Shinjae Yoo
